title: KFC Cricket Festival inspires young players
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The annual KFC...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The annual KFC Regional Mini Cricket Festival recently took place in Plettenberg Bay.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The annual KFC Regional Mini Cricket Festival recently took place in Plettenberg Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It brought together young cricket enthusiasts from across the region, offering them a chance to showcase their talent and enjoy the spirit of the game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Attending the event were Carlos Koeberg, the vice president of SWD Cricket, and Limpho Ntsudu, KFC Mini Cricket's regional co-ordinator for the area.","html":"Attending the event were Carlos Koeberg, the vice president of SWD Cricket, and Limpho Ntsudu, KFC Mini Cricket's regional co-ordinator for the area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: KFC Cricket Festival inspires young players
